title: Deals
description: A money-saving opportunity the deal-hunter found for the trip — a cheaper flight window, a better-value hotel, a discounted activity, a transit pass. Advisory only; never a confirmed booking.

tripId.description: the trip this deal is for

title.description: short headline, e.g. 'Book Lisbon→Porto train 3 weeks out for €12'

description.description: the detail, markdown, with cited sources — what the saving is and how to capture it

estimatedSavings.description: rough amount saved vs the naive option, in `currency`

url.description: link to the source or booking page (never auto-booked)

status.description: 'active' while it stands, 'taken' once the traveller acts, 'expired' when the window passes

expiresAt.description: when the deal or its booking window lapses

trip.description: the trip this deal is for
